title: MESOP conversion completed, ARTO shares climb up
body: ARTO completes first MESOP conversion of 4.31 million shares

title: Successful IPO, CBDK acquires venue and MICE company for IDR 2.3 trillion
body: In line with CBDK’s IPO prospectus, the IDR 2.3 trillion raised by the company from this corporate action has now been transferred to IPN.

title: Stock split plan approved, SAMF shares rally
body: SAMF shares have rallied in the past week since the stock split plan was approved last week (16/1).

title: Unveil the successor of Oei Tjie Goan as TKIM’s controller
body: Jackson Wijaya Limantara is the successor to Teguh Ganda Wijaya as the controlling shareholder of TKIM.

title: EXCL-FREN merger triggers volatility; bright outlook for TOWR and MTEL?

title: Back in red, foreign transactions closed with net sell of 1.04 billion shares
body: 2.60 billion GOTO shares sold by foreigners, with net sell volume of 1.22 billion.

title: Opening the week, BBRI and BIPI led Top Net Buy
body: BBRI and BIPI topped the net foreign buy leaderboard this Monday (20/1).

title: One year after IPO, GRPH shares fell 51.43%
body: GRPH's share performance fell 51.45% after a year of its capital market debut on January 18, 2024.

title: HOKI to buy Gurih rice
body: HOKI signed a rice sale and purchase contract with PT Gurih Mitra Perkasa.

title: Acquiring ministry contract, JAST promised 30% revenue growth in 2025
body: “With this achievement, combined with the extended projects from 2024, JAST has successfully recorded a 30% revenue increase in early 2025 compared to 2024.”

title: Credit distribution projected to slow down in Q1 2025
body: Credit distribution in Q1 2025 is projected to be lower than Q4 2024, albeit higher than Q3 2024.

title: SOLA to secure asphalt contract in West Kutai
body: SOLA acquires project contract worth IDR 416.97 billion in West Kutai, East Kalimantan.

title: BUKA responds to PKPU petition
body: BUKA believes that PKPU petition has no legal power, as the company has no outstanding obligations owed to the petitioner.

title: Joining in, MUTU participates in inaugural carbon exchange trading
body: As part of its contribution, MUTU purchased 30% of emission produced by the company in this first international carbon exchange trading.

title: Media Retail Indonesia becomes a new investor of 5.85% of Era Media (DOOH) shares
body: Central Business Alliance Pte Ltd follows by acquiring 9% of CCSI shares.

title: IDXCarbon kicks off global carbon trading
body: IDXCarbon reported growth in carbon trading value and volume in 2024.

title: Indonesia Stock Exchange suspends RATU and BRRC stocks
body: “In relation to significant cumulative price movements, the trading of RATU, BRRC stocks, and Series I BRRC-W warrants has been temporarily halted starting from the first session on January 20, 2025.”

title: Djarum Group to acquire 40% stake in DATA, here's the value
body: Djarum Group, through Iforte, will become the controlling shareholder of DATA after the acquisition took place.

title: BBTN to acquire Bank Victoria Syariah for IDR 1.06 trillion
body: The acquisition of Bank Victoria Syariah by BBTN is expected to be completed by May 2025.

title: HUMI allocates USD 39.57 million in capital expenditure, here's what it's for
body: HUMI to expand its fleet in order to capture highly potential market.

title: Outlook for CPIN and JPFA stocks amid the MBG program
body: Some government projects may serve as positive catalyst, but JPFA and CPIN, food manufacturers, still face challenges.

title: IMF and World Bank cut Indonesia's economic growth forecast
body: Both global financial institutions agreed upon cutting Indonesia's economic growth projection from 5.2% to 5.1% in 2025.

title: Check out the top gainers of the week, from RATU to WIFI
body: Shares of RATU led the Top Gainers list during last week's trading with a price increase of over 100%.

title: JCI rises 0.93% in a week, here are the supporting stocks
body: Banking stocks promoted JCI's uptrend in the past week, followed by heavy capital inflow.

title: A creditor rejects EXCL and FREN merger, here's the management's response
body: EXCL and FREN must secure approval from all creditors to conclude the merger.

title: Electric vehicle penetration accelerates, check out these automotive stock picks
body: The motor vehicle market in Indonesia has shown signs of recovery, but the industry is expected to face challenges from higher motor vehicle taxes and VAT.

title: Bayan Resources appoints former Attorney General as President Commissioner
body: Hendarman replaces Purnomo Yusgiantoro, who is being appointed as Special Advisor to the Merah Putih Cabinet.

title: AKRA joint venture with Pelindo Group dissolves, what's happening?
body: Aside from owned by AKRA, Pelindo Group also has a claim over a portion of EMS, the dissolved entity.

title: At last, foreign transaction closed with net buy of 603 million shares
body: A net buy of 628 million shares was also recorded for GOTO shares.

title: Supported by various stimuli, China’s GDP grows beyond expectations
body: China’s economic growth in 2024 was supported by substantial policy stimuli from the government.

title: BOAT sales increase 20.2% in 2024
body: To prepare for market demand, BOAT has allocated USD 1 million in capital expenditures (capex) for 2025.

title: SURE secures 71.01 BSCF natural gas allocation from Sumber Field at Tuban
body: SURE is optimistic about its capacity to supply gas to consumers after securing 71.01 BSCF natural gas allocation from the government.

title: BI Survey forecasts investment growth in Q1
body: BI Business Activity Survey predicts investment realisation in the first quarter of 2025 is expected to remain growing.

title: CIMB Niaga Finance records new financing of IDR 9.96 trillion in 2024
body: In 2025, the company targets new financing of IDR 9.5 trillion, with strategies focusing on IT development and digitalization.
